provenanceNote: Indicative trade-cost model based on published tariff schedules, freight indices, and customs fee references. Not legal or customs advice. Rates reflect cooperating-firm scenarios where AD/CVD applies.

routes.label: China → Vietnam
routes.source: ACFTA tariff schedule, Freightos/Sino-Shipping freight index
routes.notes: ACFTA preferential rate assumes valid certificate of origin. VAT (10%) excluded — reclaimable for businesses.

routes.label: China → India
routes.source: India Union Budget 2025, Taiyang News, Mercom India
routes.notes: BCD 20% + AIDC 20% on modules = 40% effective duty on CIF value. ALMM restrictions may further limit usage in government projects.

routes.label: China → United States
routes.source: USTR Section 301 list, CBP user fee schedule, Norton Rose Fulbright April 2025
routes.notes: Section 301 tariff (50%) + reciprocal tariff (10%) on CIF value. Section 201 expired Feb 2026. AD/CVD not applicable for direct CN origin (covered by 301). MPF 0.3464% capped at $651.50.

routes.label: China → Germany (EU)
routes.source: EU TARIC database, European Commission trade policy
routes.notes: EU MFN duty 0% on HS 8541.43. No active AD/CVD on solar modules (removed 2018). VAT (19%) excluded — reclaimable for businesses.

routes.label: China → Australia
routes.source: ChAFTA tariff schedule, Australian Border Force
routes.notes: ChAFTA preferential rate 0% on HS 8541.43. GST (10%) excluded — reclaimable for businesses. Customs processing fee AUD 50-200.

routes.label: Vietnam → United States
routes.source: US Commerce Dept final AD/CVD determinations April 2025, USTR reciprocal tariff schedule
routes.notes: Reciprocal tariff 46% + AD/CVD rates vary widely by exporter (50-271% AD, up to 543% CVD). This model uses cooperating-firm estimates (~65% combined AD+CVD). Actual rates are company-specific. Extreme uncertainty.
